title: Student Grade Point Averages
description: The information about grade point averages for a student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student grade point average.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student associated with the grade point averages.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

periodBased.title: Period Based
periodBased.description: The period based grade point averages for the student.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic period associated with the calculated grade point average.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

academicSource.title: Academic Source
academicSource.description: An indication of the academic sources that have been included in the grade point average (e.g. institution, transfer or all).

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level associated with the calculated grade point average.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

attemptedCredits.title: Attempted Credits
attemptedCredits.description: The number of attempted credits used to compute the grade point average.

earnedCredits.title: Earned Credits
earnedCredits.description: The number of earned credits used to compute the grade point average.

qualityPoints.title: Quality Points
qualityPoints.description: The number of quality points used to compute the grade point average.

cumulative.title: Cumulative
cumulative.description: The cumulative grade point averages for the student.
